goal: Expose a DeepSeek FIM completion command that can use the live beta completions endpoint or a deterministic recorded response before feeding output into the safe edit path.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- deepseek fim-complete --prompt 'fn main() {' --suffix '}' --response '{"choices":[{"text":"println!(\"ok\");","finish_reason":"stop"}],"usage":{"prompt_tokens":2,"completion_tokens":1}}' --json
cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: FIM requests and safe apply plans exist, but there is no command path that invokes or replays a completion response before constructing the checked edit flow.
